name: Allegiance Relic
description: A basic Eridian relic tied to a single weapon manufacturer. It enhances that brand's trademark weapon traits, making it a natural fit for allegiance-style loadouts built around one maker.
notes:
Each manufacturer has a pool of three possible weapon traits for its Allegiance Relic, and a single roll can improve up to two of them.

Burst Delay can only appear on Dahl versions. Max Accuracy is exclusive to Hyperion versions, where it improves starting accuracy and helps the weapon reach its listed maximum accuracy more quickly.

special.description: Improves weapon traits for one specific manufacturer only. The exact bonuses depend on the chosen brand and do not affect weapons from other makers.
